case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. CORBIN BELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, CORBIN THOMPSON, CANDICE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 220 HAIGHT STREET #3 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70822357)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $111.07 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 70815432) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70822357), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED AUG-21-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, CORBIN THOMPSON, CANDICE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, CORBIN THOMPSON, CANDICE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, CORBIN THOMPSON, CANDICE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70815367), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED AUG-21-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, CANDICE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70815367), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED AUG-21-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, CORBIN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70822357) AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, CORBIN THOMPSON, CANDICE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
